sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (event_date DateTime, user_id UInt32);
UPDATE test_dates SET event_date = plus(event_date, 10) WHERE user_id = 1;
SELECT user_id, plus(event_date, 5) AS updated_date FROM test_dates;
SELECT user_id, event_date, plus(event_date, INTERVAL 1 DAY) AS incremented_date FROM test_dates;
